---
title: "Lecture 5: Week 1 Review"
date: 2026-06-22
summary: "Week 1 Review and Q&A"
url_slides:
url_code:
page-layout: full
draft: false
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE)
```

## Info and Materials

* **Date**: {{< meta date >}}
* **Topics**: {{< meta summary >}}
* **Slides**: No slides for this session
* **Code**: No in-class code for this session

<!--
* **Slides**: [View Slides]({{< meta url_slides >}})
* **Code**: `usethis::use_course("{{< meta url_code >}}")`
-->

## Learning Objectives

Today, we will review the following topics and answer any questions you may have:

- Quiz 1 answers
- Week 1 course content
- Homework Assignment 1


## Before Class

- If you have not already done so, complete Lecture 4 participation questions. You can find them in the Lecture 4 Zoom chat (the recording is available on Canvas > UChicago Main Zoom > Cloud Recordings) or in [this document](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1f5jZ1ynOMV-axF-toNtec-KyOwhLvSYZCx0BlPaslxQ/edit?usp=sharing) after class. They will remain open until the start of this lecture (e.g., Lecture 5).
- HW1 is open and due today (11:59 PM Chicago time, remember no late submissions allowed). Access it from the [Assignments page](https://brinasab.github.io/css-website-summer/hw/). 
- Complete Quiz 1 from [Canvas](https://canvas.uchicago.edu/courses/72552). You have unlimited attempts; due 1h before today's class and no late submissions accepted
- Bring any questions you have about the Week 1 materials!
